title: viola × markensteinensis
intro: Viola × markensteinensis is a hybrid species of the viola genus, specifically a cross between Viola canina and Viola riviniana, known as a "hybrid viola" or "Viola hybrid". It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Viola × markensteinensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
